name: Transmit Entertainment Limited
summary: Transmit Entertainment Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a media and entertainment company in the Hong Kong, Macau, the People's republic of China, South East Asia region, and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Film and TV series Production and Distribution; Film Exhibition; Post-Production; and Advertising and Marketing. The company is involved in the production of Chinese films and TV series; and operation of five Hong Kong based cinemas, one Mainland China based cinema, and one post-production company. It also distributes films and TV series; and offers film advertising and promotion services, and printed and digital media publication services. In addition, it offers cinema, screenwriter, artiste, and director management; and Internet celebrity agency services, as well as engages in the e-commerce business. The company was formerly known as Pegasus Entertainment Holdings Limited and changed its name to Transmit Entertainment Limited in February 2018. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong. Transmit Entertainment Limited is a subsidiary of Nice Rich Group Limited.
